titles: 코스피 6,506을 만든 건 2,400개 아니야, 두 회사야 — 67% 캐리의 진짜 얼굴
같은 한은이 같은 주에 호황과 침체를 발표한 날 — 38년 만의 K자의 날
반도체 빼면 GDP 0.77% — ING가 '5월 인하' 아닌 '하반기 인상'을 말하는 이유

image_concepts.A: 코스피 6,506 뒤 두 반도체 회사 실루엣 — 두 개의 초대형 빌딩과 왜소한 군중, 한은 발표장 정면 인물(익명) + 빨간 경고등
image_concepts.B: K자 양극화 차트 — 상승 라인(반도체)과 하락 라인(소비심리)이 4월 23일 동일 지점에서 교차하는 분기도, 네이비+골드 데이터 비주얼

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 실사. 한국은행 브리핑룸 정면. 익명의 중앙은행 정책위원급 동아시아 남성 인물이 짙은 네이비 수트 차림으로 연단 뒤에 서 있고, 뒤 대형 스크린에 두 개의 거대한 반도체 회사 로고 실루엣(로고 판별 불가한 추상적 형태)과 '6,506'이라는 대형 숫자가 밝은 골드 톤으로 떠 있다. 인물 얼굴은 정면 키 라이트로 또렷하게 밝게 비춰지고, 표정은 심각하고 단호함. 빨간 경고등이 상단 좌측에서 깜빡인다. 상단 우측에 한글 볼드 '6,506 두 회사야' 텍스트 배치 (10자 이내). 전체적으로 모바일 썸네일에서도 한눈에 보이는 고채도 고대비 룩.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic wide shot of a brightly lit central bank briefing room, an anonymous East Asian male policymaker in his late 50s wearing a dark navy suit standing behind a wooden podium. His face is fully illuminated by a strong frontal key light from the front-left, with eyes catching a clear highlight, expression serious and resolute, skin tone naturally bright and readable. Behind him a massive luminous screen glows in vivid saturated cobalt blue, displaying two oversized brightly outlined semiconductor chip silhouettes with glowing golden edges dominating the frame, and a huge radiant golden number '6,506' hovering above them in a bold modern sans-serif font, the gold accent rendered as luminous metallic gold #FFC83D rather than muted ochre. A bright punchy red warning light glows in the top-left corner of the screen, throwing soft red bounce light into the room. In the upper-right quadrant of the frame, a bold Korean Hangul headline reads '6,506 두 회사야' on two lines (top line: '6,506', second line: '두 회사야') in a clean bold sans-serif typeface, set in pure ivory white #FFFFFF with a thick red drop shadow for maximum contrast. The headline is sized to fit comfortably within the upper-right quadrant with at least 12% margin from the top edge and 10% margin from the right edge, and stays entirely above the 45% horizontal line of the frame so it never enters the bottom gradient region. Every Korean Hangul syllable is drawn complete with all strokes fully visible, no character cropped, no text bleeding off the canvas, with adequate letter spacing for clean mobile thumbnail readability. Color palette: rich saturated cobalt navy with bright highlight zones, luminous metallic gold accents, vivid red warning dot, pure ivory white headline type. Lighting style: bright editorial key lighting, high-contrast and high-saturation rather than moody chiaroscuro, optimized for YouTube thumbnail visibility at small sizes. Composition follows thumbnail best practices with subject face on left-third and Hangul headline reserved upper-right. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B 실사. 고급 금융 데이터 비주얼. 밝은 코발트 네이비 배경 위에 선명한 네온 골드 K자 그래프 두 획이 교차 — 위쪽 획은 가파르게 상승하는 반도체 주가 라인(SK하이닉스 72% 라벨, 글로우 효과), 아래쪽 획은 급락하는 소비심리 라인(CSI 99.2 라벨, 빨간 글로우). 두 라인의 분기 지점에 '2026-04-23' 날짜 마커와 밝은 빨간 점. 하단 왜소한 실루엣 군중이 위쪽 라인을 올려다본다. 좌측 상단에 한글 볼드 'K자의 날' 텍스트 (5자) — 두 획 사이에 끼워 넣어 시각적 긴장감 강조. 모바일 썸네일에서도 또렷한 고채도 룩.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic high-end financial data visualization, ultra-wide cinematic composition with bright vivid lighting optimized for thumbnail visibility. Dominant element is a large luminous neon-gold K-shaped chart formed by two crossing trajectory lines glowing intensely on a saturated cobalt navy textured background with bright ivory grid lines. The upper diagonal line rises steeply from lower-left to upper-right with a strong golden glow halo, labeled 'SK 72%' in bright ivory sans-serif type. The lower diagonal line descends sharply from upper-left to lower-right with a vivid red glow, labeled 'CSI 99.2' in saturated red. The two lines cross at a single radiant divergence point marked with a brightly glowing red dot and the date label '2026-04-23' in luminous gold. At the bottom third, tiny silhouetted human figures in dark suits look up toward the rising line, backlit by the chart glow giving scale. In the upper-left quadrant of the frame, well between the two diverging lines but clear of them, a bold Korean Hangul headline reads 'K자의 날' in a clean bold sans-serif typeface, set in pure ivory white #FFFFFF with a luminous gold outline and subtle outer glow. The headline is sized prominently for thumbnail readability but fully contained within the upper-left quadrant with at least 12% margin from the top edge and 10% margin from the left edge, and stays entirely above the 45% horizontal line of the frame so it never enters the bottom gradient region. Every Korean Hangul syllable — 'K', '자', '의', '날' — is drawn complete with all strokes fully visible, no character cropped, no glyph bleeding off the canvas, with adequate letter spacing. Bright punchy volumetric light rays radiate from the divergence point outward. Color palette: vivid cobalt navy #1B3A8E with bright highlight zones, luminous neon gold #FFC83D, saturated red #FF2A2A accent, bright ivory grid lines and headline. Lighting style: bright high-contrast editorial visualization, vivid saturation rather than muted museum tone, optimized for mobile YouTube thumbnail visibility. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 와일드카드. 1988년과 2000년의 데자뷰 이중 오버레이. 좌측 반쪽은 밝은 따뜻한 황금빛 1988년 올림픽 당시 감성의 신문 헤드라인 '38년 만의 최고'와 빈티지 64K D램 칩(스튜디오 키 라이트로 또렷하게 비춤), 우측 반쪽은 2000년 나스닥 전광판('NASDAQ 5,046')을 강한 빨강 LED 글로우로 강조한 명도 높은 흑백 이미지. 중앙엔 두 시대를 가르는 밝은 세로 빛 한 줄기와 현재 시점 '2026'을 보여주는 빛나는 황금 타임스탬프. 상단에 한글 볼드 '38년 만의 데자뷰' 텍스트 (8자). 모바일 썸네일에서도 두 시대 대비가 한눈에 보이는 고채도 룩.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic split-frame composition with bright editorial lighting, dual-era overlay optimized for thumbnail readability. Left half shows a vintage 1988 Seoul Olympic era aesthetic illuminated by warm bright golden-hour studio key light — a clear Korean newspaper headline near the top reading in Hangul '38년 만의 최고' in legible weathered serif type with strong contrast against a richly textured ivory paper background, and a luminous close-up of a vintage 64-kilobit DRAM chip catching a bright golden specular highlight, saturated warm amber and luminous ochre tones rather than muted ones. Right half shows a high-contrast black-and-white 2000-era NASDAQ trading floor with a massive vintage electronic ticker board prominently displaying the number '5,046' rendered in vivid blazing red LED segments that glow brightly against deep blacks, with bright CRT monitor glow throwing punchy backlight across the frame. Down the vertical center a wide brilliant luminous golden vertical light ray powerfully splits the two eras, with a glowing radiant golden timestamp '2026' hovering mid-frame in elegant modern serif and a soft outer glow halo. Across the upper-center band of the frame, horizontally centered, a bold Korean Hangul headline reads '38년 만의 데자뷰' in a single line in a clean bold sans-serif typeface, set in luminous bright ivory white with a thick warm gold outline and subtle drop shadow that bridges the amber and monochrome halves. The headline is sized to fit comfortably within the central upper band with at least 12% margin from the top edge and 8% margin from each side edge, and stays entirely above the 40% horizontal line of the frame so it never enters the bottom gradient region. Every Korean Hangul syllable — '38', '년', '만', '의', '데', '자', '뷰' — is drawn complete with all strokes fully visible, no character cropped, no glyph bleeding off the canvas, with adequate letter spacing for clean mobile thumbnail readability. Mood: dramatic historical echo with bright editorial confidence rather than melancholic dimness, cinematic depth, sharp focus across both halves. Color contrast between bright saturated amber-gold past on left and crisp high-key monochrome past on right, united by the radiant central golden ray of the present and the brilliant ivory white modern headline. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.
